Cozy Earth: Hey Jenny, this is Sarah from the Cozy Earth Care Team. Thanks for checking out our site! cozyearth.attn.tv/a7lsP0b8wEvE 

Are you looking for anything in particular today?

I'm looking for a a lighter  weight for the hoodie/top or the long sleeve crew new pajama shirt and aching pants . I love the bottoms have pockets! So I have to wait til another holiday or birthday or something.  i dont have any coupons at the moment to keep the cost down!
Cozy Earth: Check out our Men's Modern Modal Hoodie, a lighter option available here: https://cozyearth.attn.tv/aDW2O4ZslsID. For discounts, sign up for our email list for future promotions!

I am on the email list - it's just usually towels on sale! Or I don't check right away the only sizes left are like xs or or 44- large. I do have a membership but never get discounts for new items i order so it's a bit disappointing bc I love the pieces I have! Does the men's pants match with the shirt? I'm looking for something that matches :)
Cozy Earth: For a matching set, consider the Men's CityScape Hoodie & Sweatpant Set. Available here: https://cozyearth.attn.tv/an1nqLgYtKGs. Perfect for a coordinated look!
Unfortunately they don't have my size bc im 5'1 and 120 pounds.
I will try to keep looking!
Is the city scape one similar? If I'm a medium in clothes what size do I order for men's?
Cozy Earth: Our sleepwear is generously sized. If you're between sizes, consider sizing down. Check the size guide on the product page for the best fit.
Ok thank you so much!!
Just kidding the city scape don't have any smalls
I'm so sorry I just have one more question - for the women's waffle jogger set it says it's a new arrival. Do members get 50% of New arrivals?
Cozy Earth: Thanks for the image. Please note that the benefit included in the membership perks is 50% off New Product Launches, and not off New Arrivals. I hope that clarifies.

templates: If a cx complains about pricing, use CAP shortcut
tone: Make sure you're using a formal and professional tone!
Allow the cx to have the last word when possible
Don't use the word “SALE”, it's a Retiring Styles Event
dos_and_donts: They will only have bundled deals rather than sale items in the future
promo_and_exclusions: The 10% Welcome Offer is valid for 10 days
If cx is asking about 10% code, use WLC shortcut
→ if they didn't find the code they've probabaly subscribed before
→ if they push, you can ESC
